hypothesis: Tool consolidation audit finds archivable tools and consolidatable code patterns reducing total tool count and duplication
method: Automated orphan detection (reference scanning across tools, docs, maintenance, lessons), dormancy analysis (git log session extraction), function duplication analysis (parse_lesson across 14 tools)

parse_lesson_duplication.wiring_status: shared parser in lesson_header.py; 14 tools still use local versions (behavior divergence: body-cites vs header-cites, single vs list domain)

diff: Expected >=5 archivable: found 1 meeting criterion (testimony_calibration >=44s dormant), 2 approaching (market_report, source_hierarchy at 34s). Expected consolidatable pattern: found parse_lesson (14 tools). Shared parser built and bulk-tested. Wiring deferred due to behavior divergence.
successor: Wire 2-3 header-only parse_lesson users to shared parser. Revisit market_report.py and source_hierarchy.py at S543 (>=44s threshold).
